name: jt-toolkit
description: JT's reusable Claude Code toolkit: AI consulting delivery and product-build workflows extracted into portable skills, agents, and commands.

plugins.name: consulting-toolkit
plugins.description: Client delivery: opportunity research, n8n workflow blueprints, build playbooks, proposal PDFs, and resume tailoring.

plugins.name: product-builder
plugins.description: App/product build loop: 8-phase workflow, quality-pass subagent, format-on-save hook, and ship command.
